MASHSHIELDER-ROUND_TABLE_FRAGMENT.title: Round Table Fragment
MASHSHIELDER-ROUND_TABLE_FRAGMENT.descri: #You begin each combat in *Shielder form. At the end of your turn, retain up to !B! Block. Whenever an enemy hit fails to get through your Block: gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars. Whenever you lose HP: gain !NpCharge! *NP *Charge. Each conversion triggers at most !MaxProcs! times per turn.
MASHSHIELDER-ROUND_TABLE_FRAGMENT.flavor: A splinter of the great table of Camelot. Even broken, it remembers how to protect.
MASHSHIELDER-LORD_CAMELOT_RESTORED.title: Lord Camelot (Restored)
MASHSHIELDER-LORD_CAMELOT_RESTORED.descr: #At the end of your turn, retain up to !B! Block. Whenever an enemy hit fails to get through your Block: gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars. Whenever you lose HP: gain !NpCharge! *NP *Charge. Each conversion triggers at most !MaxProcs! times per turn. Replaces the Round Table Fragment's retention and conversions.
MASHSHIELDER-LORD_CAMELOT_RESTORED.flavo: The Castle of the Distant Utopia, whole once more. The wall that protected humanity's final journey.
MASHSHIELDER-FOU_AMULET.title: Fou's Amulet
MASHSHIELDER-FOU_AMULET.description: #Once per combat, the first time you would die: survive at 1 HP.
MASHSHIELDER-FOU_AMULET.flavor: Kyu! A small white blessing that refuses to let her go.
MASHSHIELDER-SPARE_GLASSES.title: Spare Glasses
MASHSHIELDER-SPARE_GLASSES.description: #At the start of each combat, draw !C! additional card(s).
MASHSHIELDER-SPARE_GLASSES.flavor: Senpai, have you seen my glasses? ...Oh. Right. Thank you.
MASHSHIELDER-ORTINAX_CORE.title: Ortinax Core
MASHSHIELDER-ORTINAX_CORE.flavor: Chaldea's finest engineering, humming with stored magical energy.
MASHSHIELDER-A_TEAM_DIARY.title: A-Team Diary
MASHSHIELDER-A_TEAM_DIARY.description: #Whenever you enter a room, gain 1 Max HP.
MASHSHIELDER-A_TEAM_DIARY.flavor: The records of those who should have climbed instead. She carries them all.
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_BOND.title: Bond Gauge
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_BOND.description: #Mash earns Bond points from combat victories (/+2, Elites /+3, Bosses /+5) and from entering events, shops and rest sites (/+1). Each *Bond* level grants permanent gifts: Max HP (Lv 1/3/6/9), starting *NP *Charge (Lv 2/5/8), starting Block (Lv 4/7) - and at Lv 10, she will not let you fall: survive lethal damage at 1 HP once per combat. In multiplayer, the Max HP and Block gifts scale with the player count.
MASHSHIELDER-SUMMON_TICKET.title: Summon Tickets
MASHSHIELDER-SUMMON_TICKET.description: #At card rewards you may give up the card to roll the gacha: 50% chance of a dupe, +25% per failed roll. A dupe raises Mash's NP level (the counter, max 5), increasing her Noble Phantasm cards' power by 15% per level.
MASHSHIELDER-SUMMON_TICKET.flavor: One more ticket. Just one more.
MASHSHIELDER-HOLY_GRAIL.title: Holy Grail
MASHSHIELDER-HOLY_GRAIL.description: #Palingenesis: gain !MaxHp! Max HP. While held, limits break: Bond can reach level 12 and NP level can reach 6.
MASHSHIELDER-HOLY_GRAIL.flavor: A wish that surpasses the maximum.
